name: Subsurface Conduit
visual_description: A lean, dark-haired human rogue in sleek tactical gear crouches in a deep underground shaft, fingers splayed against ancient stone walls that glow with faint bioluminescent veins. Their expression shows intense focus as ethereal knowledge-streams flow visibly around them, suggesting communion with something vast and primordial beneath the earth.
full_prompt: A lean, dark-haired human rogue in sleek tactical gear crouches in a deep underground shaft, fingers splayed against ancient stone walls that glow with faint bioluminescent veins. Their expression shows intense focus as ethereal knowledge-streams flow visibly around them, suggesting communion with something vast and primordial beneath the earth.. Stylized digital illustration, geometric composition, cool steel-blue and teal palette, screen-glow lighting, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
